children.text: Personal Info & Hobbies
My name is Liu Bo.
I am thirteen years old.
I am in Grade 7.
I am tall and I have short hair.
I like reading books and playing sports.
Daily Activities & Routines
I have a busy daily routine.
children.translation: 我有着忙碌的日常生活。

children.text: I usually get up at 6:30 in the morning.
Then I brush my teeth and take a shower.
I go to school at 7:15.
I have lunch at school with my classmates.
children.translation: 我和同学们在学校吃午饭。

children.text: We finish school at 5:00 in the afternoon.
After school, I often do homework.
children.translation: 放学后，我经常做家庭作业。

children.text: Personal Info & Hobbies
My name is Liu Bo, a thirteen-year-old student in Grade 7.
children.translation: 我的名字是刘波，一个就读于七年级的十三岁学生。

children.text: As for my appearance, I am tall and have short hair.
children.translation: 至于我的外貌，我很高并且留着短发。

children.text: In my spare time, I enjoy reading books and playing sports because they make me happy.
children.translation: 在我的空余时间里，我喜欢看书 and 做运动，因为它们让我快乐。

children.text: Daily Activities & Routines
Like most students in China, I have a busy daily routine.
children.translation: 像中国的大多数学生一样，我有着忙碌的日常生活。

children.text: I usually get up at 6:30 every morning, brush my teeth, and take a shower quickly.
children.translation: 我通常每天早上6:30起床，刷牙，然后快速洗个淋浴。
children.highlight: usually, get up, brush, take a shower

children.text: After getting dressed, I go to school at 7:15.
children.translation: 穿好衣服后，我于7:15去上学。
children.highlight: After getting dressed, go to school

children.text: I have lunch at school with my friends, which gives us time to chat.
children.translation: 我和朋友们在学校吃午餐，这给我们留出了聊天的时间。

children.text: We finish school at 5:00 in the afternoon.
In addition, I do homework after school to prepare for the next day.
children.translation: 此外，我放学后做家庭作业，为第二天做准备。
children.highlight: In addition, do homework, prepare for
